name: lithium
author: Lithium contributors
description: Lithium desktop app for chat-first research automation

scripts.dev: concurrently -k "vite --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5173 --strictPort" "tsx scripts/generate-icons.mts && tsup src/main/index.ts src/main/preload.ts --format cjs --out-dir dist-electron --external electron --external node-pty --watch" "wait-on tcp:5173 dist-electron/index.cjs dist-electron/preload.cjs && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 LITHIUM_APP_NAME='Lithium Dev' electron dist-electron/index.cjs"
scripts.dev:main: npm run generate:icons && tsup src/main/index.ts src/main/preload.ts --format cjs --out-dir dist-electron --external electron --external node-pty --watch
scripts.dev:electron: wait-on tcp:5173 dist-electron/index.cjs dist-electron/preload.cjs && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 "LITHIUM_APP_NAME=Lithium Dev" electron dist-electron/index.cjs
scripts.build: npm run generate:icons && npm run build:main && npm run build:renderer
scripts.build:main: tsup src/main/index.ts src/main/preload.ts --format cjs --out-dir dist-electron --external electron --external node-pty --clean
scripts.dev:packaged: npm run package:dir && npm run package:open
scripts.check:release: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build && npm audit --omit=dev --audit-level=high
